summary: Completed comprehensive testing of all bug fixes (G2, G9, G7/G6, G7, G1) and order lifecycle flows. All backend APIs and frontend OrdersView functionality verified successfully.
passed_tests: G2 Bug Fix: Sales order filtering by status (reserved, dispatched) - all filters return correct results
G2 Bug Fix: Sales order filtering by customer_id - returns only orders for specified customer
G2 Bug Fix: GET /api/sales-orders (no filter) - returns all 8 orders as expected
G9 Bug Fix: Dashboard active_orders metric correctly counts all active orders (8 orders, not capped at 20)
G7/G6 Bug Fix: Document preview endpoint returns 200 for all tested order IDs (so_001, so_007, so_003)
G7 Bug Fix: Barcode generation for products - returns 200 with label_html
G7 Bug Fix: Barcode generation for WMS tasks - returns 200 with label_html
G1 Bug Fix: All 8 sales orders have required fields (items[].quantity, sales_name, shipping_city)
Order Lifecycle: Approve flow works correctly (SO-0007 approved successfully)
Order Lifecycle: Confirm flow works correctly (SO-0007 confirmed successfully)
Frontend: Orders view loads correctly with 8 order cards
Frontend: Order detail panel displays city correctly (Bandung)
Frontend: Order detail panel displays sales name correctly (Sales: Ayu Permatasari)
Frontend: Order items show correct quantity format (25 meter, 60 meter)
Frontend: No 'Invalid Date' found - dates properly formatted (18/6/2026, 07.37.52)
Frontend: Status filter dropdown works correctly (8 orders -> 2 reserved orders)
